hooks.command: SF=.claude/.session-snapshot.md; echo '# Session Snapshot' > $SF; echo "Generated: $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)" >> $SF; echo "Branch: $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown')" >> $SF; echo '' >> $SF; echo '## Modified Files' >> $SF; git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null >> $SF; echo '' >> $SF; echo '## Staged Files' >> $SF; git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null >> $SF; echo '' >> $SF; echo '## Recent Commits (this branch)' >> $SF; git log --oneline -5 2>/dev/null >> $SF; echo '' >> $SF; if [ -f .claude/ralph-prd.json ]; then echo '## Ralph Progress' >> $SF; grep -c '"passes": true' .claude/ralph-prd.json 2>/dev/null | xargs -I{} echo "Stories passed: {}" >> $SF; grep -c '"passes": false' .claude/ralph-prd.json 2>/dev/null | xargs -I{} echo "Stories remaining: {}" >> $SF; echo '' >> $SF; fi; echo '## Active Tasks' >> $SF; echo 'Review the snapshot above to resume where you left off.' >> $SF; echo 'Session snapshot saved to .claude/.session-snapshot.md'
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '^git (commit|push)'; then echo '=== Staged files ===' && git diff --cached --name-only; fi

echo '## Quality Enforcement Protocol

### TDD (non-negotiable for code stories)
RED: Write ONE failing test → GREEN: Minimum code to pass → REFACTOR: Clean up with tests green.
No production code without a failing test first. Code written before a test = delete and restart.
Exceptions: config, infra, migrations, static assets, markdown templates.

### Double Review (po/all-roles modes)
After teammate reports done: spec-reviewer (conformity) + code-quality-reviewer (quality) run in parallel as fresh subagents.
Both must PASS before acceptance-validator runs.
Skipped in dev mode.

### Plan Granularity
Stories > 50 lines: decompose into 2-5 minute tasks with exact files, complete code, and verification commands.
Priority: CLAUDE.md > these guidelines > defaults.'; echo ''; if [ -f .claude/.session-snapshot.md ]; then echo '## Session Resumed — Previous State'; cat .claude/.session-snapshot.md; fi
